summary: "Hunt API security misconfiguration — mass assignment, JWT attacks, prototype pollution, HTTP verb tampering. Mass assignment: send {is_admin:true, role:admin, verified:true} on profile/account/reset
preconditions: Skill hunt-api-misconfig has been invoked locally
strategy: Identify the dominant trigger signals matching hunt-api-misconfig
Apply the smallest targeted change that satisfies the Skill workflow
Abort if any validation step fails
Record the outcome as a Capsule on success

_source.rationale_paper: Wang, Ren, Zhang. From Procedural Skills to Strategy Genes. arXiv:2604.15097
